title: U.S. conducts strikes on multiple Iranian targets after Hormuz Strait ship attacks, Centcom says
summary_full: Kuwait accused Iran of fresh attacks after U.S. strikes hit Iranian targets, raising fears over the Strait of Hormuz and oil prices.
summary_public: Kuwait accused Iran of fresh attacks after U.S. strikes hit Iranian targets, raising fears over the Strait of Hormuz and oil prices.
